title: Immersion Learning & New Review Modes
changes: Added Recall mode: type your answer from memory with auto-grading
Added Listening mode: audio-only card front for sound recognition practice
Added Immersion face mode: hanzi + audio only, pinyin hidden behind tap-to-reveal
Added Short Story mode: AI generates reading practice using your vocabulary
Added character decomposition: see radical/component breakdowns on any card
Added wrong-card drill: review missed cards immediately after a session
Added undo button for accidental review ratings
Added due cards badge in the navigation bar
Example sentences now available for all card types, not just grammar
Audio auto-plays when each new card appears
Fixed SRS: test mode correct answers now properly advance card intervals
Fixed flashcard buttons showing actual review intervals instead of hardcoded labels
Fixed interactive lessons now update SRS and earn XP
Fixed lesson progress preserved across page navigation and browser sessions
Improved review card selection: new cards capped at 30% to prevent backlog
Performance: parallelized database queries and reduced API overhead
Upgraded AI model to Claude Sonnet 4.6
